ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., supervised, unsupervised) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used to train the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Detailed documentation for the model */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team associated with the model */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the model is public or restricted */,
  "last_evaluated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last evaluated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration details of the job */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the job */,
  "train_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training data set used */,
  "validation_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validation data set used */,
  "test_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test data set used */,
  "hardware_used" TEXT /* Hardware configuration used for training */,
  "cloud_provider" TEXT /* Cloud provider used for training */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the job was run */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the job */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the job */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Date the job started */,
  "finished_at" TEXT /* Date the job finished */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_test_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_data_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_train_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_data_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_hardware_used FOREIGN KEY ("hardware_used") REFERENCES hardware_configurations ("hardware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("validation_data_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that uses the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the hyperparameter */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for the hyperparameter */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., loss, accuracy) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number when the metric was recorded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metric */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "losses" (
  "loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loss value */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that the loss value belongs to */,
  "loss_value" REAL /* Value of the loss */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number when the loss was recorded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the loss value */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the loss value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_losses_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "val_loss" (
  "val_loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation loss value */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that the validation loss value belongs to */,
  "val_loss_value" REAL /* Value of the validation loss */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number when the validation loss was recorded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the validation loss value */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the validation loss value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("val_loss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_val_loss_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precision_score" (
  "precision_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precision score */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that the precision score belongs to */,
  "precision_score_value" REAL /* Value of the precision score */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number when the precision score was recorded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the precision score */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the precision score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precision_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precision_score_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recall_score" (
  "recall_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recall score */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that the recall score belongs to */,
  "recall_score_value" REAL /* Value of the recall score */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number when the recall score was recorded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the recall score */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the recall score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recall_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recall_score_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "f1_score" (
  "f1_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each F1 score */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that the F1 score belongs to */,
  "f1_score_value" REAL /* Value of the F1 score */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number when the F1 score was recorded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the F1 score */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the F1 score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("f1_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_f1_score_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time metric */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that the time metric belongs to */,
  "time_value" TEXT /* Value of the time metric (in seconds) */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number when the time metric was recorded */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the time metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the job */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the job was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the research team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the research team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sets" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data set */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the data set */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data set (e.g., training, validation, test) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the data set */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the data set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the data set was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_configurations" (
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware configuration */,
  "hardware_name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware configuration */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Specifications of the hardware configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the hardware configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the hardware configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hardware_id")
)
